app_info.subtitle: Manage AI project workflows
app_info.description: ColaMeta helps teams inspect AI engineering project health, review plans and evidence, run bounded validations and executor workflows, and manage Git and release-readiness tasks through permission-scoped MCP tools.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves or computes list registered projects results and does not create, update, delete, or execute project state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish public content or mutate third-party systems; any effects remain within the user's private ColaMeta project or runtime.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform an irreversible external action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can change project-local state through the explicit create delivery receipt actions, so it is not strictly read-only.

test_cases.description: List the projects available through the connector.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the registered projects and enough identity information to select one safely.

test_cases.user_prompt: Open the ColaMeta Commander for colameta-self-dev and show its safe next actions.
test_cases.expected_output: Renders the project-scoped Commander with health, workflow, and authorization-boundary information.

test_cases.description: Verify the external Apps connector closeout.
test_cases.user_prompt: Check the Apps connector smoke status for colameta-self-dev.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns connector reachability, runtime provenance, evidence gaps, and the closeout decision.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show release submission readiness and remaining evidence for colameta-self-dev.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns current readiness, evidence progress, blockers, and the next safe review action.

test_cases.description: Preview a bounded validation without running it.
test_cases.user_prompt: Prepare a current-version validation preview for colameta-self-dev, but do not run it.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a bounded validation preview with fixed commands and a preview identifier, without execution.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated weather questions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Will it rain in Shanghai tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because weather is outside ColaMeta's project-workflow scope.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unsupported public messaging.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Post an announcement to my social media accounts.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not publish social posts or public messages.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not retrieve credentials or private authentication material.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the connector token, OAuth secret, and tunnel credentials.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should refuse the request and must not expose tokens, secrets, credentials, or private authentication state.
